common.start-profile-search: Search users to see their recipes

errors.ingredients-required: At least one ingredient is required
errors.source-url-invalid: The link must start with https://

errors.username-too-short: Username must be at least 3 characters

LoginPage.login-feature-share-description: Send links of your recipes whenever you want

RecipesPage.title: Recipes

Brown the beef mince.
Add tomato and simmer.

ProfilePage.title: Profile
ProfilePage.description: Here you can view and modify your personal information
ProfilePage.exports-description: Download a copy of your recipes and recipe images
ProfilePage.export-images-description: Download all exported recipe photos as ZIP

PasswordResetPage.request-description: Enter your email and we'll send a link if it belongs to an existing account
PasswordResetPage.request-success-description: If an account exists for that email, a password reset link is on the way
PasswordResetPage.request-error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
PasswordResetPage.reset-description: Use at least 8 characters for your new password
PasswordResetPage.reset-success-description: You can now sign in with your new password
PasswordResetPage.invalid-token-description: This reset link is missing or invalid
PasswordResetPage.reset-expired: This reset link has expired. Request a new one.

EmailVerificationPage.success-description: Your email address has been verified
EmailVerificationPage.expired-description: This verification link has expired. Sign in and request a new one from your profile.
EmailVerificationPage.invalid-description: This verification link is invalid or has already been used

welcome.subject: Welcome to CookBook, {name}!
welcome.title: Welcome to CookBook
welcome.subtitle: Your recipes, organized and ready to share
welcome.intro: Thanks for joining CookBook. Start building your personal recipe collection whenever you're ready.
welcome.step-3: Choose whether your profile is public or private
welcome.verify-body: Please confirm this email address so your account is easier to recover
welcome.help: You can manage your profile and privacy from your account page
welcome.footer: You're receiving this email because you created a CookBook account

verification.subject: Verify your CookBook email
verification.title: Verify your email
verification.subtitle: Confirm this address for your CookBook account
verification.body: Use this link to verify the email address on your CookBook account
verification.footer: If you did not request this email, you can ignore it

email-change-verification.subject: Confirm your new CookBook email
email-change-verification.title: Confirm your new email
email-change-verification.subtitle: Verify this address before it is added to your account
email-change-verification.body: Use this link to confirm the new email address for your CookBook account
email-change-verification.help: If you did not request this change, you can ignore this email
email-change-verification.footer: This email change was requested for your CookBook account

password-reset.subject: Reset your CookBook password
password-reset.title: Reset your password
password-reset.subtitle: This link expires in 30 minutes
password-reset.body: Use this link to choose a new password for your CookBook account
password-reset.help: If you did not request a password reset, you can ignore this email
password-reset.footer: This password reset link was requested for your CookBook account

account-deleted.subject: Your CookBook account was deleted
account-deleted.title: Account deleted
account-deleted.subtitle: Your CookBook account has been permanently removed
account-deleted.body: Your CookBook account and recipes have been deleted
account-deleted.footer: You're receiving this email because your CookBook account was deleted

email-changed.subject: Your CookBook email was changed
email-changed.title: Email changed
email-changed.subtitle: Your account email has been updated
email-changed.body: Your CookBook account email was changed to {email}
email-changed.help: If you did not make this change, reset your password and contact support
email-changed.footer: You're receiving this email because your CookBook account email changed

password-changed.subject: Your CookBook password was changed
password-changed.title: Password changed
password-changed.subtitle: Your account password has been updated
password-changed.body: The password for your CookBook account was changed
password-changed.help: If you did not make this change, request a password reset immediately
password-changed.footer: You're receiving this email because your CookBook account password changed
